name: тАЛAgencyHandy
description:
What AgencyHandy Does

AgencyHandy is a newer tool that focuses on the "unfiltered" agency experience: getting orders, doing the work, and getting paid. ItтАЩs built for agencies that act like "order fulfillment centers.тАЭ тАЛIt provides a service catalog where clients can "shop" for your agency services. ItтАЩs perfect for the "productized" model where you have set prices for things like "5 Blog Posts" or "GMB Setup."

Source: AgencyHandy

тАЛKey Features

тАЛЁЯПЖ Service Catalog: A "checkout" experience for your marketing services.

тАЛЁЯПЖ Task-to-Invoice Sync: Automatically generates tasks when an order is paid.

ЁЯПЖ Client Ticket System: Keeps support requests tied to the clientтАЩs billing profile.

тАЛBenefits of AgencyHandy

тАЛItтАЩs incredibly affordable and focused on the workflow of a growing team. It removes the "back and forth" of custom quoting by forcing clients into standardized packages.

тАЛPricing

  • тАЛFreelancer: $29/mo
  • тАЛTeam Starter: $99/mo (up to 10 users)
  • тАЛBusiness Pro: $199/mo (up to 30 users)

There are also discounts available when choosing to bill annually.

тАЛPros

тАЛтЬЕ Very budget-friendly for the feature set.

тЬЕ Great for "order-based" agency models.

тАЛCons

тАЛЁЯЪл Limited customization for the client portal.

ЁЯЪл Lacks deep financial forecasting found in tools like Scoro.
what_people_say:
тАЛWhat Customers Say

тАЛ"I love the organization ability of Agency Handy. It really helps me keep my orders organized and in one spot, along with payments."

тАУ Review collected by and hosted on G2.com.
